name: Seasoned Norwegian Flatbread
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Pkg. Kavli Thin Norwegian Flatbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Place the flatbread in piles as it comes out of the package on a bread board.
3. Using a bread knife, saw the pieces into thirds or halves, cutting several thicknesses at a time.
4. Combine butter, garlic, Parmesan cheese, and parsley.
5. Thinly spread the mixture over the flatbread.
6. Place on a cookie sheet and bake for just 5 minutes until lightly browned.
7. Watch closely. Let cool and store in airtight containers.
8. It freezes well. Serve at room temperature.
